---
title: "Contact"
---

For questions about the workshop, please contact:

**Workshop organizing committee**  
[few@fen.uchile.cl](mailto:few@fen.uchile.cl)

## Organizing committee

We warmly welcome any questions about submissions or participation — please don't hesitate to reach out to the organizers, Francisco Pino ([fjpino@fen.uchile.cl](mailto:fjpino@fen.uchile.cl)) and Ariadna Jou ([ajou@fen.uchile.cl](mailto:ajou@fen.uchile.cl)).
